items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
### ZYNQ

ZYNQ is a WebRTC + games framework.
It combines peer-to-peer communication with a game library system.

No backend required.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
#### Script Tag

Loads ZYNQ globally into `window.ZYNQ`.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.1/index.min.js"></script>
```

After loading:
```js
window.ZYNQ
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
#### ES Module (Side Effect Import)

This version does NOT export bindings. It only initializes global `window.ZYNQ`.

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.1/index.min.js"
```

After import:
```js
window.ZYNQ.Peer
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Game Object
items.content:
### Game Object Structure

Represents a single game entry.

```ts
Game {
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices?: number[],

  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

Example:
```js
{
  name: "Alien Hominid",
  alias: "alien-hominid",
  url: "arcade/alien-hominid",
  thumb: "https://cdn/...",
  category: "shooter"
}
```

items.label: State & Properties
items.content:
### ZYNQ.games State

```ts
config: {
  src: string,
  cdn: string
}

all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]
favorites: Set<string>
deviceType: number
history: string[]
```

#### Getters
```ts
list: Game[]
total: number
filteredCount: number
```

children.label: .init()
children.content:
##### init(options?)
Loads full game database from CDN and prepares filtering.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

Options:
```ts
{
  mode?: 'all' | 'supported' | 'favs',
  search?: string,
  sort?: string,
  src?: string,
  cdn?: string
}
```

children.label: .search()
children.content:
##### search(query)
Filters games by name or alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

Result:
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
```

children.label: .random()
children.content:
##### random(limit)
Returns random subset of games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.random(3)
```

children.label: .getRandomOne()
children.content:
##### getRandomOne()
Returns one random game.

```js
const game = ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

children.label: .shuffle()
children.content:
##### shuffle()
Shuffles current filtered list.

```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

children.label: .sortBy()
children.content:
##### sortBy(field)
Sorts games by field (default: name).

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

children.label: .sortByPopularity()
children.content:
##### sortByPopularity()
Sorts by playCount (if available).

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

children.label: .getByAlias()
children.content:
##### getByAlias(alias)
Find single game by alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: .getByCategory()
children.content:
##### getByCategory(category)
Filters by category.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```

children.label: .filterSupported()
children.content:
##### filterSupported()
Keeps only supported games for device.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

children.label: .filterFavorites()
children.content:
##### filterFavorites()
Keeps only favorited games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

children.label: .toggleFavorite()
children.content:
##### toggleFavorite(alias)
Adds/removes favorite.

```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

children.label: History API
children.content:
##### addToHistory(alias)
Adds game to history.

```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("alien-hominid")
```

##### getHistory()
Returns full history objects.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

##### clearHistory()
Clears history.

```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```

children.label: Utilities
children.content:
##### reset()
Resets filtered list.

```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

##### isFavorite(alias)
Check favorite state.

```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: Constructor
items.content:
### ZYNQ.Peer
WebRTC abstraction layer on top of PeerJS.

```js
const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({
  video: true,
  audio: true,
  txt: true
})
```

children.label: .connect()
children.content:
#### connect(peerId)
Creates a data connection.

```js
peer.connect("abc-123")
```

children.label: .send()
children.content:
#### send(peerId, data)
Sends message to peer.

```js
peer.send("abc-123", "hello")
```

If connection is not ready → message is queued.

children.label: .call()
children.content:
#### call(peerId, options)
Starts media call.

```js
peer.call("abc-123", {
  video: true,
  audio: true
})
```

children.label: .hangup()
children.content:
#### hangup(peerId)
Stops media call.

```js
peer.hangup("abc-123")
```

children.label: ready
children.content:
#### ready
Fired when peer receives its ID from server.

```js
peer.on('ready', (id) => {})
```

children.label: open
children.content:
#### open
Fired when connection is established.

```js
peer.on('open', (peerId) => {})
```

children.label: message
children.content:
#### message
Triggered when data arrives.

```js
peer.on('message', (msg) => {})
```

children.label: stream
children.content:
#### stream
Remote media stream received.

```js
peer.on('stream', ({ from, stream }) => {})
```

children.label: close
children.content:
#### close
Connection closed.

```js
peer.on('close', ({ id }) => {})
```

children.label: error
children.content:
#### error
Error handler.

```js
peer.on('error', (err) => {})
```

children.label: reconnecting
children.content:
#### reconnecting
Auto reconnect triggered.

```js
peer.on('reconnecting', ({ id, attempt, delay }) => {})
```
